notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG idiosyncratic-exceedance basket from approved card HAN-IE-2023_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1 and evaluate the paired package rather than standalone legs. At each broker-month transition, use synchronized simple returns from the prior six completed months, residualize each energy leg on an equal-weight XTI/XNG/XAU/XAG factor and its square, buy lower IE, sell higher IE, and reject excessive post-rounding dollar-notional mismatch. XAU and XAG are read-only factor members. Q02 is a strict four-CFD-factor and two-CFD-rank falsification; no source performance or portfolio admission is claimed.
